title: The Modded Minecraft Cult Server Modpack
description: The Official Modpack for The Modded Minecraft Cult Server
body:
# Welcome Cult Members
This is the Official Pack used for The Minecraft Cult Server.

### WEE WOO NEW UPDATE OUT
This brand new 2.0 update centers around the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) Mods. It retains old favorites such as [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) but adds new experiences with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau), and more!. Also included is [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) of course and now [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) providing beautiful views of the world. 




<details>
<summary>Archive</summary>


~~It is a collection of mods that includes everything from technical mods like [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania), and [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) to world generation and farming mods like [Terralithe](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), and [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)/[Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) to cursed mods like [Infinite Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-dimensions) and [Eat Everything](https://modrinth.com/mod/eat-everything). Also included are several clientside mods and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for preformance. This wide collection contains so many mods to ensure that many playstyles are supported. Whether you want to get deep in the technical aspects of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) or just want to explore new terrain and look around while carrying your things in a chest with [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) there's something for everyone.~~

</details>
